name: Mid-Atlantic Terascale Partnership - MATP
aka: MARIA / Virginia Tech (Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University)
notes: MATP (AS40220) is a consortium of research institutions in Virginia, Maryland, and Washington formed to to support research activities that require next-generation high-performance network connectivity.  We have routers in Equinix Ashburn and TelX Atlanta and provide commodity and R&E network services to most research universities in Virginia.  MATP is managed by Virginia Tech (AS1312).
